base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bush_tile_palette2 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Bush/hill-top decoration. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bush/hill-top decoration; palette-swap renders as green overworld / dark underground / brown castle / aquatic underwater
